subject: Faz 4 Tamamlandi: Blazor Server Trading Dashboard
body:
Faz 4 implementasyonu tamamlandi ve main'e merge edildi.

## Yapilan Degisiklikler

### 1. Application Katmani (DTO + Mapper + Port)
- IMarketEventPublisher port arayuzu (Application/Abstractions)
- 5 yeni DTO: SignalDto, TradeDto, PortfolioDto, TickerDto, SystemStatusDto
- DomainMappers static class: Signal/Trade/Portfolio/Candle -> DTO extension metodlari
- MarketDataWorker Application katmanina tasindi (Worker'dan Application.Workers'a)

### 2. Worker Guncelleme
- NullMarketEventPublisher: Headless deployment icin no-op publisher
- Program.cs: NullMarketEventPublisher DI + auto-migration on startup

### 3. Dashboard Projesi (Yeni)
- LiveFeedService: ILiveFeedService + IMarketEventPublisher (thread-safe singleton)
- PortfolioRefreshService: 5 saniyede bir portfolio guncelleme (BackgroundService)
- TradingHub: SignalR hub (ICryptoHubClient, SubscribeToSymbol/UnsubscribeFromSymbol)
- Program.cs: Tum DI kayitlari + auto-migration + SignalR + ApexCharts

### 4. Blazor UI Bilesenler
- CandlestickChart.razor: LightweightCharts.Blazor 5.0.8.2 ile canli OHLCV grafigi
- EquityChart.razor: ApexCharts equity curve (engine bazli)
- MainLayout/NavMenu/NavLinkItem: Collapsible sidebar, dark theme
- Shared: TickerStrip, SignalCard, StatCard, TradeRow
- Pages: MarketPage (/), SignalsPage, TradesPage, PortfolioPage

### 5. Styling
- Tailwind CSS v4 dark trading theme
- CSS degiskenleri: --color-accent-green: #00d4aa, --color-accent-red: #ff4757
- Tailwind build MSBuild target (Condition='Exists tailwindcss.exe')

### 6. Testler
- DomainMapperTests: 8 test (Signal/Trade/Portfolio/Candle mapping)
- Toplam: 77 test, tumu gecti

## Build / Test Sonuclari
- dotnet build: 0 hata, 0 uyari (CryptoTrader projeleri)
- dotnet test: 77/77 gecti

## Commit
- Branch: feature/phase4-dashboard
- Main'e --no-ff merge: 'Merge feature/phase4-dashboard: Faz 4 Blazor Server Dashboard + Live Feed'

## Notlar
- LightweightCharts.Blazor 5.x API: AddSeries<CandlestickStyleOptions>(LCSeriesType.Candlestick) - v3.x'ten farkli
- ApexCharts 4.0.0 gerektiriyor (AddApexCharts() extension 3.x'te yok)
- Color type: System.Drawing.Color - Extensions.ParseColorCode() ile parse ediliyor
- Fire-and-forget pattern: async void UpdateChartAsync() - event handler icin
- Ambiguous SeriesType: LCSeriesType alias ile cozuldu
